---
id: create-a-device
title: "Create a device"
description: "Creates a new device in the specified domain."
sidebar_label: "Create a device"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/v1/fs-pbx-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a device"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/domains/{domain_uuid}/devices"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a new device in the specified domain.

Notes:
- `device_template` is deprecated and retained for backward compatibility.
- Use `device_template_uuid` as its successor.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"path","name":"domain_uuid","description":"The domain UUID.","example":"4018f7a3-8e0a-47bb-9f4f-04b1313e0e1b","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"device_address":{"type":"string","description":"MAC address for the device.","example":"0004f23a5bc7"},"serial_number":{"type":"string","description":"Optional device serial number.","example":"8603123456789"},"device_profile_uuid":{"type":"string","description":"Optional device profile UUID.","example":"51759db8-c8bf-4b2f-b48a-6577d7ad6a1a"},"device_template":{"type":"string","description":"Deprecated legacy template identifier. Prefer device_template_uuid.","example":"Yealink T46U"},"device_template_uuid":{"type":"string","description":"Optional provisioning template UUID. Must be a valid UUID.","example":"a6cf59ba-4b2b-4bdd-b870-35cc55bca146"},"device_description":{"type":"string","description":"Optional label or description for the device.","example":"Reception desk device"}},"required":["device_address"]}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"201":{"description":"Created","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","example":{"device_uuid":"c0ec8113-aa15-40ac-8437-47185dd9dcf4","object":"device","domain_uuid":"4018f7a3-8e0a-47bb-9f4f-04b1313e0e1b","device_profile_uuid":"51759db8-c8bf-4b2f-b48a-6577d7ad6a1a","device_address":"0004f23a5bc7","device_label":"Front device","device_provisioned_date":null,"device_provisioned_ip":null,"device_provisioned_agent":null},"properties":{"device_uuid":{"type":"string","example":"c0ec8113-aa15-40ac-8437-47185dd9dcf4"},"object":{"type":"string","example":"device"},"domain_uuid":{"type":"string","example":"4018f7a3-8e0a-47bb-9f4f-04b1313e0e1b"},"device_profile_uuid":{"type":"string","example":"51759db8-c8bf-4b2f-b48a-6577d7ad6a1a"},"device_address":{"type":"string","example":"0004f23a5bc7"},"device_label":{"type":"string","example":"Front Desk Phone"},"device_template":{"type":"string","example":"Yealink device"},"device_provisioned_date":{"type":"string","example":null},"device_provisioned_ip":{"type":"string","example":null},"device_provisioned_agent":{"type":"string","example":null}}}}}},"400":{"description":"Invalid not found","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","example":{"error":{"type":"invalid_request_error","message":"Domain not >
  
</StatusCodes>
